name: SOC 2 Baseline — Trust Services Criteria
description: Baseline governance policies for SOC 2 Type II compliance. Covers Security (CC6), Availability (A1), Processing Integrity (PI1), Confidentiality (C1), and Privacy (P1–P8) trust services criteria.

policies.policy_name: CC6: Logical Access — Attested Models Only
policies.description: Blocks access to models that have not been attested as active, implementing SOC 2 CC6.1 logical access controls. Only registered, attested models may serve requests.
Warns when self-attested models are used without admin verification. Supports SOC 2 CC6.6 boundary protection by flagging unverified model sources.

policies.policy_name: PI1: Processing Integrity — Block Toxic Output
policies.description: Blocks harmful model output to ensure processing integrity. SOC 2 PI1.2 requires outputs to be complete, accurate, and valid; toxic content violates this criteria.

policies.policy_name: C1: Confidentiality — Block PII in Responses
policies.description: Blocks model responses containing PII to protect confidential information. Supports SOC 2 C1.1 and C1.2 confidentiality commitments for information classified as confidential.

policies.policy_name: P3: Privacy — Warn on PII in Prompts
policies.description: Warns when PII is detected in prompts, supporting SOC 2 P3.1 personal information collection notice and P4.1 use/retention limitations. Enables data minimization review.
Always-pass sentinel policy ensuring every AI interaction is recorded for SOC 2 CC7.2 monitoring and A1.2 availability commitments. Validates audit trail coverage.

policies.policy_name: CC9: Risk Mitigation — Prompt Injection Detection
policies.description: Warns on common prompt injection patterns to mitigate vendor and business partner risk per SOC 2 CC9.2. Reduces exposure to adversarial AI inputs from external sources.
